title: UMI Disk Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for disk/volume information. Implementations MUST return objects conforming to this schema regardless of host operating system.

DeviceName.description: The OS-level device identifier. Windows: 'C:', Linux: '/dev/sda1', macOS: '/dev/disk1s1'.

MountPoint.description: Where the volume is mounted. Windows: 'C:\', Linux/macOS: '/' or '/home'.

FileSystem.description: The filesystem type. Normalized to uppercase.

TotalBytes.description: Total capacity in bytes. Agents: divide by 1GB (1073741824) for human-readable display.

UsedPercent.description: Percentage of disk used, rounded to 1 decimal place.

IsRemovable.description: True if this is a removable/external drive.

Label.description: Volume label if one exists, null otherwise.
